archetype_reasoning: 744 resolved geo/elections trades across 2001 total trades. Iran_ME is the dominant domain: 462 trades, 63% accuracy, 290 contested (63% of Iran_ME trades at contested prices). Trump_US is a meaningful secondary: 140 trades, 75% accuracy, 73 contested. Russia_UKR is thin: 50 trades, 54% accuracy, 26 contested — near-chance, not a trusted domain. Other: 88 trades, 58% accuracy — modest. The Iran_ME depth (462 trades, 63% acc, 290 contested) is robust and qualifies for DOMAIN_ONLY weight in Iran_ME specifically. Trump_US at 75% on 140 trades including 73 contested is the strongest secondary accuracy in the pool for this domain. PNL = $1,777 (positive, plausible). geo_elo_active = 2258.6, just above LEGENDARY threshold of 2175. geo_resolved_trades_count = 170 in traders table vs 744 actual — same data integrity discrepancy pattern seen on June 29 (geo_elo may be computed from a subset). NOTE: last 10 overall accuracy = 50%, with recent trades weighted toward near-certainty entries. Iran_ME contested accuracy (63%) is the signal-relevant metric. Confidence MEDIUM until human review verifies the geo_elo calculation basis and confirms no pipeline anomaly.

However, signal weight set to MINIMAL pending human review: (1) geo_elo_active barely above LEGENDARY threshold (2258.6 vs 2175 cutoff) — recency decay could push below threshold, (2) geo_resolved_trades_count discrepancy (170 stored vs 744 actual) requires investigation, (3) standard new-qualifier human review required before inclusion in any STR-003 signal. After human review clears these items, upgrade to DOMAIN_ONLY (Iran_ME, Trump_US) is recommended.
